@seed_user username=bob password=Bob123!1 first_name=Bob last_name=Jones university=UCF major=Math grad_year=2026

# Bob sends request to Alice
1       # Login
bob
Bob123!1
4       # Find someone you know
Alice Smith
1       # Send connection request
9       # Logout

# Alice rejects Bob's request
1       # Login
alice
Alice1!1
5       # View pending requests
2       # Reject
9       # Logout
3       # Exit
